creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 180449
hangouts pidgin shar file

Dear FreeBSD committer:

Find below a new port to support hangouts protocol in pidgin.

This port is somewhat contrived as depends on bitbucket infraestructure, and I have not found any example to mimic. DISTNAME definition as commit tag is a little weird: it is dependent on PORTVERSION. I think should be a better way to accomplish the same. 

Any advice to improve the port Makefile is welcome.

Best regards
